key_learnings: Genetic variants such as MTHFR and APOE significantly influence how individuals metabolize folate, fats, and other key nutrients.
research_findings: COMT and CYP gene variants affect estrogen metabolism and antioxidant capacity; personalized nutrient dosing based on genotype shows improved health outcomes.
current_focus_areas: Expanding research on polygenic nutrition scores and their application in personalized dietary recommendations.
